THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SANCHEZ, JOSE NICHOLAS GALDAMEZ $2,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $200.00 INTEREST, $285.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,485.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
